series_title:
Accounts Payable
Informaiton
Expenditure Vouchers -
Employee Expenses
series_description:
Records related to the management and
administration of the employee expense
reimbursement function. Includes
employee expense reports and moving
expenses.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_title:
Fiscal Management
Reports
Accounts Payable -
Management Reports
series_description:
Records related to the review and
management of the accounts payable
function. Includes aging and distribution
reports. Does not include the actual
vendor invoices and supporting
documentation.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 6 years
comments:
See 4.1.001, ACC1020.
TCDRS FE + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 5 for internal
business practices.

series_title:
Fiscal Management
Reports
Accounts Receivable -
Management Reports
series_description:
Records related to the review and
management of the accounts receivable
function. Includes accounts receivable
analysis. Does not include invoices or cash
receipts.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 6 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 5 for internal
business practices.

series_title:
Uncollectable Accounts
Returned
Checks/Warrants/Drafts -
Bad Debt and Collections
series_description:
Records related to the monitoring,
collecting, and writing off of bad debts.
Includes collection records and
uncollectible accounts.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_title:
Bank Records
Banking - Account
Reconciliation - General
Accounting
series_description:
Records related to analysis and audit of
the TCDRS bank account. These records
support the monthly account
reconciliation process and are used to
document reconciliations that develop
from that analysis. Includes bank
statements for TCDRS bank accounts.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_title:
Accounts Payable
Information
Banking - Cancelled
Checks and Registers -
General Accounting
series_description:
Records related to cancelled checks and
check registers for TCDRS bank accounts,
including custodian banks. These records
are used to verify the receipt of funds by
third parties and the debit of cash from
TCDRS accounts. Includes cancelled
checks and check registers.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_description:
Records related to the collateral provided
by banks to secure TCDRS cash balances.
Includes collateral agreements and
monthly collateral reports.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_title:
Banking Records
Electronic Fund Transfers -
Deposits and Wire
Transfers
series_description:
Records related to deposits and wire
transfers made to and from TCDRS bank
accounts, including custodian accounts.
These records are used to verify the
transfer and deposit of funds. Includes
deposit slips and wire transfers.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_title:
Annual Operating
Budgets
Budgets and Financial
Forecasts
series_description:
Records related to internal planning and
financial management. Includes records of
TCDRS income, and expenses, on a
monthly, quarterly, and annual basis.
Includes fiscal year budgets for
departments. Includes monthly and
annual reports summarizing financial
budgets and goals.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_description:
Records documenting the purchase, sale,
and improvement of real property and
equipment, as well as depreciation,
amortization, etc. Includes appropriation
for expense and fixed assets.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 4 years
comments:
TCDRS LA + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL LA + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_title:
Annual Operation
Budgets
Detail Charts of Accounts
series_description:
Records related to the maintenance and
updating of the chart of accounts.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_description:
Financial statements, reports, and
background information submitted to
government agencies (IRS, state
legislature, etc.) and others. Includes
financial statements from all business
activity and Annual Financial Reports.
Special purpose - i.e. federal financial
reports, salary reports, etc. Includes HUB
Reports.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 7 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 7 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 5 for internal
business practices.

series_description:
Records related to general accounting
functions not covered elsewhere. These
may include records related to
miscellaneous accounting services
provided to other departments, trouble-
shooting, and special accounting projects.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years

series_title:
General Accounting
General and Subsidiary
Ledgers - General Ledger -
Journal Entries
series_description:
Records used to transfer charges between
accounts and for summarizing account
information. Includes entries made to the
general ledger to correct coding errors,
correct ledger accounts, accrue for
expenses not yet paid, or other similar
activities. Includes all final postings to the
general ledger.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 7 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 7 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.
Vital Record

series_description:
Records related to the review and
management of the TCDRS interfund
accounting process used to transfer
monies between the trust fund and the
expense fund.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years

series_title:
Accounts Receivable
Information
Accounts Receivable
Ledgers - Plan
Administration
series_description:
Records documenting cash receivables
due for Plan contributions and payments.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 4 retention periods
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.
Vital Record

series_description:
Records that document unclaimed
balances related to inactive member
accounts.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
Property Code 74.103 does not
apply to TCDRS.

series_title:
General Accounting
General and Subsidiary
Ledgers - General Ledger -
Journal Entries - Plan
Administration
series_description:
Records used to transfer charges between
Plan Administration accounts and for
summarizing account information.
Includes entries made to the general
ledger to correct coding errors, correct
ledger accounts, accrue for expenses not
yet paid, or other similar activities.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_title:
General Accounting
General and Subsidiary
Ledgers - General Ledger -
Year-End Ledger and Trial
Balances - Plan
Administration
series_description:
Records related to the Plan Administration
general ledger. Includes the actual general
ledger that summarizes all plan accounts.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 7 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 7 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.
Vital Record

series_title:
Accounts Payable
Information Payments to
Members - Plan
Administration
series_description:
Records related to payments to members
of Plan-related financial obligations.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_title:
Office Procedures
Department - Organization
and Tracking
series_description:
These records are organizational in nature
and are used to document and track
department functions, workflow, etc.
Does not include documents subject to a
different retention code. Example: agency
rules, policies, and procedure (1.1.070,
AUD1060A).
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 1 year

series_description:
Calendars and scheduling programs or
applications maintained by staff
documenting appointments, itineraries or
other activities of TCDRS employees and
officials. Includes departmental desk
calendars.
retention_statement: Calendar Year End plus 1 year
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only the
calendars, appointment, and
itinerary records of elected
officials, executive staff, board or
commission members, division
directors, and program heads
require archival review. Contact the
State Archives when these records
have met their retention periods.
CAUTION: A record of this type
purchased with personal funds, but
used by state officials or employee
to document his or her work
activities may be a state record and
subject to this retention period.
See Open Records Decision 635
issued in December 1995 by the
Attorney General.

series_title:
Plans and Planning
Records Internal Project
Management
series_description:
Records related to the management of
internal projects, special studies, analyses,
and other department events not covered
elsewhere. Includes adhoc studies
performed at the organization or work
group level. Includes notes, presentations,
reports, studies, project plans, meeting
minutes, status reporting, etc. Excludes
pending legislation projects.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Data processing
planning records are not archival.
See 1.1.027 for Proposed
Legislation.

series_title:
Forms History and
Maintenance
Forms and Letter
Template Management
series_description:
Records related to the management of
TCDRS forms and letter templates.
Includes forms requisitions and samples of
forms and draft letters templates. Master
versions of all forms and letter templates
used internally and externally and all
subsequent revisions, including any
associated design or design modification
requests.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
Records related to internal postal
operations. Includes the postal logs.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_title:
Security Access Records
Physical Access Records
series_description:
Records relating to the request and the
issuance of physical access to the TCDRS
building and grounds. Includes signed
statements or similar instruments
requesting access and documents granting
access of keys, building fobs, parking
passes, etc.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments: Vital Record

series_description:
Records related to logs, registers, or other
records documenting visitors to TCDRS
offices and/or building.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
TCDRS AC + 3 retention period
exceeds TSL 3 for internal business
practices. See 5.4.0011, 5.4.012 for
Security - Clearance.

series_description:
Records related to routine security actions
taken to protect TCDRS employees,
equipment, buildings, and information.
Does not include physical access records.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments: Vital Record

series_description:
Records that document the strategic and
business plans of TCDRS.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 8 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: The final version
of Strategic Plans must be
submitted to the Texas State
Publications Depository Program
per the Texas Administrative Code.
Working files and related
documentation used in creating the
final plan are not subject to
archival review and may be
disposed of at the expiration of the
retention period.
TCDRS AC + 8 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 6 for internal
business practices

series_title:
Inspection Repair and
Maintenance Records -
Vehicles
series_description:
Records documenting vehicle activity,
such as mileage and maintenance.
Excludes ownership records, titles and
registration.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
Note: These records are necessary
only in regards to an accident. See
5.6.007 for Vehicle Records -
Ownership. TCDRS AC + 3 retention
period exceeds TSL LA + 1 for
internal business practices.

series_description:
Includes mileage, fuel/oil consumption,
passengers carried and other related
operational information.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
Note: These records are necessary
only in regards to an accident.
TCDRS AC + 3 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices. See 5.6.007 for
Vehicle Records - Ownership. See
5.6.003 ADM1360A

series_description:
Records documenting vehicle ownership,
and licensing. Records include vehicle
titles and registration.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
Note: These records are necessary
only in regards to an accident.

retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_title:
Vehicle Use Reports
Vehicle Records -
Vehicle/Driver Accident
Records
series_description:
Records related to accidents in which
TCDRS vehicles and/or TCDRS drivers are
involved. Includes accident analyses,
vehicle damage reports, and driver
accident reports.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years
comments:
TCDRS AC + 3 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices. See
5.6.004ADM1400C

series_title:
Audits External Audits -
Audit Workpapers and
Reports
series_description:
Audits and reviews performed by or on
behalf of TCDRS, including the working
papers that support the audit. Also
includes audits performed on TCDRS.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years
comments:
Note: The State Auditor's Office
retains any copies of its audits
performed on Texas state agencies.

series_description:
Records related to internal operational
audits and data reviews including quality
assurance audits and other internal non-
financial operational audits.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years

series_description:
Records documenting the guiding
principles (policy) and courses of action
(program/process) intended to ensure
compliance to internal requirements.
Includes policy and program
documentation and the written
procedures related to the adoption of
these policies/programs. Also includes
working files and related documentation
used in creating rules, policies, and
procedures.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years
comments:
ARCHIVAL NOTE: Working files and
related documentation used in
creation the final rules, policies,
and procedures, are not subject to
archival requirement and may be
disposed of at the expiration of the
retention period.
TCDRS AC + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 3 for internal
business practices.
Vital Record

series_description:
Any internally distributed manuals,
guidelines, or similar records that define
agency wide policies and procedures
concerning the personnel of an agency.
Includes employee's handbook, evaluation
procedures, and travel policies.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 6 years
comments:
TCDRS US + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL US + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_description:
Records documenting the internal and
external procedural requirements with
respect to the accounting department.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 6 years
comments:
TCDRS US + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL US + 3 for internal
business practices.
Vital Record

series_title:
Customer Surveys Adhoc
and Periodic Surveys
series_description:
Records related to member and employer
surveys conducted by TCDRS to gauge a
customer's level of knowledge or need.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
AV to be determined by
Compliance Assurance Director.
See 1.1.038, AUD2000A for
Customer Surveys.

series_title:
Reports and Studies (Non-
Fiscal) - Raw Data
Benchmarking and
Performance Measures
Data Collection
series_description:
Records related to data collection and
information compiled for the purpose of
producing non-fiscal reports.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include source
documentation used for
information or data included in or
directly related to another records
series in this schedule. AV to be
determined by Compliance
Assurance Director. See 1.1.067 for
Reports and Studies (Non-Fiscal) -
Benchmarking and Performance
Measures

series_title:
Reports and Studies (Non-
Fiscal)
Benchmarking and
Performance Measures
Reports
series_description:
Records related to annual, sub-annual, or
special reports and studies on non-fiscal
aspects of TCDRS' programs, services, or
projects compiled by TCDRS personnel, by
advisory committees, or by consultants
under contract with TCDRS that are not
noted elsewhere in this schedule. Includes
reports distributed either internally or to
other entities.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Reports are
archival when they deal with
significant aspects of the agency's
programs. For agencies that have
an archival appraisal, separate this
records series by each type of
archival coding, A, R, or E. See page
ix for more information.
See 1.1.065, AUD2020A.

series_description:
Reports projecting life expectancy, future
benefits, and other information needed to
calculate contributions and provisions of
TCDRS pension programs.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Records related to the rules used to
complete actuarial evaluations. Includes
the actuarial cost methods.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Records related to individual member and
beneficiary annuitants. Includes active and
inactive members records transferred to
the annuitant file as well as other
retirement documentation. Does not
include processing of member
transactions or disability medical records.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 75 years
comments:
See BEN1140 for Member File -
Active/Inactive. See BEN1160 for
Member File - Disability Retirement
Medical Records. See BEN1200 for
Members - Retirement Processing.
See BEN1220 for Members -
Transaction Processing. See
BEN1240 for Members -
Withdrawal Processing.

series_description:
Payroll data and related records
transferred from employers to TCDRS.
Does not include processing
documentation.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 75 years
comments:
See BEN1120 for Employers -
Payroll Processing.

series_description:
Records documenting an employer's
narrative, including creations documents,
census data, prior services, orders and
resolutions regarding retirement plans,
plan provisions, changes or potential
changes to plans, annual plan documents,
and general correspondence, etc. Any
record related to the employer's status
within TCDRS. Does not include
contribution rates calculations, employer
payroll reports and processing, or
documents considered part of the official
member, annuitant record.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years
comments:
See BEN1300 for Rates and
Calculation factors; BEN1060 and
BEN1120 for employer payroll;
BEN1040 and BEN1140 for
Member and Annuitant records.

series_description:
Records documenting the receipt and
processing of employer payroll
information. Does not include payroll
data.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
See BEN1060 for Employers -
Employer Payroll.

series_description:
Records related to individual employee
members, including account status,
service credit, deposits and deductions,
and estimates of retirement benefits.
Includes active and inactive members.
Does not include processing of member
transactions, annuitant files, and disability
medical records.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 75 years
comments:
See BEN1040 for Annuitant File.
See BEN1160 for Member File -
Disability Retirement Medical
Records. See BEN1200 for
Members - Retirement Processing.
See BEN1220 for Members -
Transaction Processing. See
BEN1240 for Members -
Withdrawal Processing.

series_title:
Member File - Disability
Retirement Medical
Records
series_description:
Medical records submitted to support the
decision making process of a members
disability retirement. Includes the medical
board decision and supporting medical
records.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Records related to the month-end
balancing of withdrawal and annuity
payments made on employee accounts.
Includes withdrawal transfer reports,
annuity change reports, and the hold
report.
retention_statement: 4 years

series_description:
Records related to processing benefits for
System members who are deceased or
have retired and are receiving benefits.
Does not include Retirement Number logs
or the annuitants file.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years
comments: See BEN1040 for Annuitant File.

series_description:
Records used to balance member
employee accounts or to update service
credit prior to distribution to individual
member files.
retention_statement: 4 years

series_description:
Records related to processing applications
for withdrawals to individual accounts of
members who are no longer participants
in TCDRS.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 75 years

series_description:
Reports and related records used to
provide information on the management
of member benefits.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
AV to be determined by Director of
Member Services

series_title:
Plan Administration -
Prospective Employers -
Non Participating
series_description:
Records related to prospective employers
communications and documents used in
the determination of benefit eligibility.
Includes all employers that did not
become a participating employer.
Excludes any employer who is a current
member or joined TCDRS.
retention_statement: 6 years
comments:
See BEN1100 for Employers -
Original Orders and Resolutions.

series_title:
Plan Administration -
Rates and Calculation
Factors
series_description:
Records documenting rates and
calculations related to plan
administration.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Records related to the production of
routine and special reports requested by
employers.
retention_statement: 4 years

series_description:
Records related to the production of
internal routine reports requested by
TCDRS staff. Includes benefit plan
actuarial reports use for benefit plan
development.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
AV to be determined by Director of
Actuarial Services

series_description:
Listings and reports on member
employees terminated from the System.
Does not include terminated member file.
retention_statement: 8 years
comments:
See BEN1140 for Member File -
Active and Inactive.

series_description:
Records related to year end processing
and schedules. Includes production of
estimates of retirement benefits for
participating members' annual statement.
Does not include individual member
statements, which are in the member file.
Includes annual statement testing plan,
meeting notes, and processing schedules.
retention_statement: 4 years
comments:
See BEN1140 for Member File -
Active and Inactive.

series_description:
Publications in any format produced
internally by or externally for TCDRS (or
are required to be distributed under law
by the System) and are publicly
distributed. Note: A state publication
includes but is not limited to: distribution
in print, on microfilm, as audiovisual
material, as interactive media or on
electronic external storage device, as an
on-line publication, which is an index to
other on-line publications, as a text,
graphic, or other digital file, or as a user
interface to a computer database.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
CAUTION: Many state publications
must be submitted to the Texas
State Publications Depository
Program, Texas State Library and
Archives Commission. The Texas
State Library and Archives
Commission will retain a copy of all
state publications submitted to it
on a continuing basis, subject to
periodic evaluation to determine if
the publication merits further
retention. Also see EXE1080 for
Comprehensive Annual Financial
Statements and ADM1320 for
Strategic Plans. See 2.1.007 for
interactive functions of website
such as Benefits Calculator.
legal_citation:
Tex Gov't Code
441.101 - 441.106;
Requirement for
Internet publication
see 13TAC§§3.1 -
3.16

series_title:
Training Materials Training
and Development
Programs - Employers and
Members
series_description:
Records related to TCDRS efforts to
provide awareness, education, and
training to employers and members
regarding plan features such as employer
contributions rates and member benefits,
and other TCDRS services. Includes
attendance lists, communications,
presentations delivered through annual
conference, employer visits, and member
visits, webinars, and other educational
methods. Does not include documents
considered part of the official member,
annuitant or employer record.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
TCDRS AC + 3 retention period
exceeds TSL US + 1 for internal
business practices.

series_title:
Mail and
Telecommunication
Listings General Mailings
series_description:
Records related to TCDRS mailings. Any
general mass mailing and individual
customized mailing created as an activity,
event, campaign from marketing software
or third party printer to members,
annuitants, employers, etc. Documents
include copy of the publication, list of
recipients, and point of delivery. Does not
include mailings considered part of the
official member, annuitant or employer
record.
retention_statement: Until Superseded

series_description:
Records related to appointments and
termination of TCDRS Board of Trustees
and Committees. These records also
include the Board Governance and other
Board policies documents.
retention_statement: Permanent

series_description:
Any document that initiates, rescinds, or
amends a regulation, policy, or procedure
that governs the programs, services, or
projects of TCDRS.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 3 years
comments: Vital Record

series_description:
Records documenting TCDRS' creation,
structure, governance, development,
significant events, plan documents, and
key staff. Includes the Comprehensive
Annual Financial Report (CAFR), enabling
statutes and rules, IRS Determination
Letters, etc.
retention_statement: Permanent
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: In the event that
the agency will no longer retain the
records of this series permanently,
after retention is met those records
will be transferred to the Archives
and Information Services Division,
Texas State Library and Archives
Commission.

series_description:
Records related to new trustee
orientation, Pension Review Board (PRB)
education requirements, and trustee
fiduciary responsibilities.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_title:
Inspection Records Air
Quality Testing and
Monitoring
series_description:
Records related to monitoring, testing,
and assessment of the air in the TCDRS
building for the presence of contaminants
or pollutants.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include
inspection reports of building
construction. See item number
5.2.028.

series_description:
Records related to the design and
construction of TCDRS building. Includes
design documents such as drawings,
blueprints, construction reports, and
construction testing records.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 10 years
comments:
See also item number 5.1.001,
FAC1100A for Contracts and Leases
- Tenant Leasing Proposals and
5.1.001, LEG1060B for Contracts
and Leases - Real Estate Leases and
5.2.028 for Building Construction
Contracts and Inspections Records
Vital Record

series_title:
Equipment Manuals
Maintenance Manuals and
Technical Reference
series_description:
Reference and technical instruction
manuals provided by the manufacturer for
products and building equipment used by
TCDRS. Includes manuals and technical
references for copiers, fax machines,
postage meter, department equipment.
retention_statement: Life of Asset

series_title:
Equipment History File
Equipment Maintenance
and Repair
series_description:
Records related to routine and/or general
maintenance and repair of building
equipment. Records include equipment
histories and work orders.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 3 years
comments:
For service agreements or
contracts related to equipment
maintenance, repairs and service,
retain in accordance with item
number 5.1.001.

Building Construction
Contract and Inspection
Records
series_description:
Records related to construction and
improvement contracts and agreements
for improvement to real property.
Includes all construction and property
improvements bid documentation.
Includes construction inspection
documents. Also includes disputes that do
not progress to litigation and claims.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 10 years
comments:
See also item number 5.1.001,
FAC1100A for Contracts and Leases
- Tenant Leasing Proposals and
5.1.001, LEG1060B for Contracts
and Leases - Real Estate Leases and
5.2.002 for Building Construction
Project Files Vital Record

series_description:
Records related to the valuation of real
property. These records may be used to

land and building appraisals. Does not
include contracts and agreements.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

TCDRS AC + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL AV for internal
business practices. See 4.7.004 for
Contracts and Agreements - Real
Estate Purchase and Sale. Vital
Record

series_description:
Contracts executed, renewed or amended
on or after August 31, 2015.

series_description:
Contracts executed, renewed or amended
on or before August 31, 2015.

series_description:

from tenants, tenant rent roll, general
management and maintenance expenses.

series_description:

exceeds TSL US for internal
business practices.

series_description:

retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

for Employee Disability Insurance
Benefits - Medical Records,
BEN1160 for Member File -
Disability Retirement Medical
Records.

Employee Insurance
Records Benefit
Enrollment and

comments:
CAUTION: Documents that serve as
payroll deduction authorizations
must maintained for the retention
period prescribed for item number
3.2.001. TCDRS AC + 4 retention
period exceeds TSL AC for internal
business practices. See HRB1060
for Benefit Enrollment and
Participation - Loan Applications,

and Participation - Pension

75 retention period exceeds TSL AC

Employee Disability
Insurance Benefits -

retention period exceeds TSL AC
for internal business practices. See

Disability Retirement Medical
Records.

than Insurance Health
Reimbursement Account

CAUTION: Documents that serve as
payroll deduction authorization

retention period exceeds TSL AC +
2 for internal business practices.

Records related to the determination and

Records related to employee
announcements and other informative

Applications for
employment - Not Hired
Employee Recruitment
and Selection - Employee
Recruitment Rejections

the documentation supporting the
decision. Also includes employment
applications and resumes.
retention_statement: 3 years
comments:
TCDRS 3 yr retention period
exceeds TSL 2 yr for internal
business practices.

Employment Opportunity
Announcements

Records related to open position

external postings.
retention_statement: 3 years
comments:
TCDRS 3 yr retention period
exceeds TSL 2 for internal business

series_title:
Employment Selection
Records Employment
Recruitment and Selection
- General
series_description:
Records related to interviews including
questions asked, notes, and recordings -
video and/or audio. Includes pre-
employment records such as driving
records, drug screenings, background
checks, and/or exams, and all other
records that document the selection
process.
retention_statement: 3 years
comments:
TCDRS 3 yr retention period
exceeds TSL 2 for internal business
practices. See 3.1.012 HRE1060A
Contains records found within
records series 3.1.026 Criminal
History Checks Vital Record

series_title:
Personnel Corrective
Action Documentation
Employee Situations
series_description:
Corrective actions are those actions which
do not affect pay, status, or tenure and
are imposed to correct or improve an
employee's job performance.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years
comments:
CAUTION: If during the retention
period of this records series, any
part of this series issued to
document and support personnel
disciplinary action under item
number 3.1.021, all documentation
from this series used to support
disciplinary action must be retained
for the minimum retention period
described by item number 3.1.021.
See 3.1.018 HRE1080A, 3.1.021
HRE1080C

series_title:
Personnel Disciplinary
Action Documentation
Employee Situations
series_description:
Disciplinary actions are those actions
which may affect pay, status, or tenure.
They are imposed to discipline an
employee whose conduct is harmful to
the best interests of the state, the agency,
or the employee work force, and for
failure to improve performance or
conduct following imposition of corrective
action. May include cause for demotion,
suspension, or dismissal, and the reasons
for failure to give written notice of
resignation. May also be used to
document evidence of employee self-
improvement efforts, as well as favorable
and unfavorable communication.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years
comments:
See 3.1.08 HRE1080A, 3.1.020
HRE1080B Vital Record

series_description:
Records related to TCDRS compliance with
its equal employment policies. Includes
reports which TCDRS is required to file
with the Equal Employment Opportunity
(EEO) Commission identifying the
workforce demographics.
retention_statement: 6 years
comments:
See 1.1.070, 1.2.005, 3.3.024,
4.7.001 for Policies, Programs, and
Procedures. TCDRS 6 yr retention
period exceeds TSL 3 for internal
business practices.

Employment Eligibility,
Documentation
Immigration and
Naturalization

in the United States.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments: Vital Record

series_description:

requirements, and reporting relationships.

retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years
comments:
TCDRS AC + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 4 for internal
business practices. Vital Record

series_description:
Records related to the structure and

Includes organization charts.
retention_statement: Until Superseded
comments:
ARCHIVE NOTE: Only charts
showing the overall arrangement
and administration structure of the
state agency need to be transferred
to the Archives and Information
Services Division, Texas State
Library and Archives Division.
Organizational charts showing
division/department level detail
are not considered archival.

Employment Selection

business practices.

Office Procedures

Policies and Procedures
Manual
series_description:
Any internally distributed manual,

TCDRS. For example: Investments
Department Policies and Procedures
Manual.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 1 year

series_description:
Reports and documents providing useful

financial statement functions.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_title:
Hardware and Software
Technical Documentation
Application
Documentation and
System Technical
Administration
series_description:
Records documenting the development of
new functionality and architecture for
TCDRS computer systems and software
applications. Examples include
requirements documentation and scope
documents, as well as information used to
provide details and a history of the
hardware technical environment such as
changes, problems, additions/deletions,
and operational status. Includes all
technical characteristics necessary for
reading or processing electronic records;
to document modifications to computer
programs; to access, retrieve, manipulate,
and interpret data in an automated
system and records that explain the
meaning purpose, structure, logical
relationship, and origin of data elements.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
CAUTION: Software needed for
access to electronic records must
be retained for the period of time
required to access the records.
Vital Record

series_title:
Disaster Preparedness
and Recovery Plans
Disaster Recovery and
Incident Response -
Plan Documentation
series_description:
Records related to the documentation of
plans that would be implemented in the
event of a business disruption and include
disaster recovery plans, incident response
plan, business continuity plans,
contingency planning, business impact
questionnaires, and another such related
documents as required.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
TCDRS AC + 3 retention period
exceeds TSL US for internal
business practices.
Vital Record

Records related to source code for TCDRS
owned software applications that are

Includes source code and their programs,

and interactive functions on the website.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

access to electronic records must
be retained for the period of time
required to access the records.
See 1.3.001, COM1060 for
informational website content.

series_description:
Hardware and software components for

resources and performance.

AV to be determined by Director of
Information Technology

System Monitoring
Records Technical Support
Request

and identify TCDRS response and

problem tacking documentation,
telecommunications service requests.
retention_statement: 3 years
comments:
TCDRS 3 yr retention period
exceeds TSL AV for internal
business practices.

series_title:
Disaster Preparedness
and Recovery Plans
Disaster Recovery and
Incident Response -
Recovery Documents
series_description:
Records related to the documentation of

retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

business practices.

series_description:

series_title:
Litigation Files Hearings
and Litigation - Litigation
series_description:
Records related to threatened or asserted
litigation regarding non-investment and
investment matters. Includes pleadings,
discovery, attorney work products, legal
opinions, transcripts, exhibits, final
judgments, settlements, court orders, and
other documents specifying final terms,
conditions, and decisions related to claims
and litigation.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE Cases that set
legal precedent or exhibit historical
value will be evaluated by the
Archives and Information Services
Division of the Texas State Library
and Archives Commission for
archival preservation. TCDRS AC + 6
retention period exceeds TSL AC+ 1
for internal business practices.

series_title:
Litigation Files
Hearings and Litigation -
Administrative Hearings
series_description:
Records related to disputes considered by
the Texas State Office of Administrative
Hearings (SOAH). Includes copies of
motions, appeals, administrative
decisions, and case files, received from
Administrative Law Judges and arbitrators.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE
Cases that set legal precedent or
exhibit historical value will be
evaluated by the Archives and
Information Services Division of the
Texas State Library and Archives
Commission for archival
preservation.
TCDRS AC + 3 retention period
exceeds TSL AC+ 1 for internal
business practices. See page xx for
additional guidelines.

series_description:
Legal research and related workpapers for
various subjects and projects related to
TCDRS business. Excludes legal opinions
documenting specific litigation.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years
comments:
See 1.1.048 for Hearings and
Litigation - Litigation See 1.1.027
for Proposed Legislation - Legal
Projects and Analysis - Proposed
Legislation and 1.1.014 for Legal
Projects and Analysis - Legal
Opinions.

series_description:
Records related to proposed, withdrawn,
emergency, and adopted rules; open
meeting notices; or any other documents
required by law to be submitted to the
Texas Register.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_title:
Proposed Legislation Legal
Projects and Analysis -
Proposed Legislation
series_description:
Records documenting proposed legislation
affecting TCDRS. Includes drafts analyses,
workpapers, studies, fiscal notes,
economic studies, bill analyses, etc.
retention_statement: 5 years
comments:
See 1.1.000 for Legal Projects and
Analysis - General and 1.1.014 for
Legal Projects and Analysis - Legal
Opinions. TCDRS 5 yr. retention
period exceeds TSL AV for internal
business practices.

series_description:
Records related to the identification and
reporting of hours worked by TCDRS
employees. Includes all time cards
submitted to payroll in order to document
hours worked for a particular period.
retention_statement: 4 years

series_description:
Records related to payroll accounting,
such as input records, summary
statements and history. Includes payroll
vouchers, reports, payroll registers, and
direct deposit payroll plan applications.
Includes withholding and payment to third
parties of amounts garnished from TCDRS
employee wages.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
Contains records found within
records series 3.2.004 Income
adjustment Authorizations and
3.2.005 W-4 Forms and 3.2.008
Direct Deposit Authorizations and
TCDRS FE + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 4 for internal
business practices. Vital Record

series_description:
Records related to TCDRS relations and
interactions with other pension funds or
industry and professional organizations,
speaking engagements (legislative
testimony), etc. Includes correspondence,
presentations, papers, speeches created
specifically with or for other pension
funds, industry and professional
associations, and speaking engagements.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
AV to be determined by the
Director of Communications or the
owner of the Copy of Record See
PUB1040 for Public Relations,
COM1060 for State Publications

series_description:
Records related to the creation of
production files for internal or external
communications created by or for TCDRS.
Production files consist of physical and
digital development and design files,
including but not limited to software
applications such as InDesign, Illustrator,
Photoshop, PowerPoint, Microsoft Word
files, etc. or any application files used to
create a final product. Also includes copy
of the print master files provided to the
printer.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Successive and
substantive drafts of major
publications may be archival. Major
is defined by both the publication'
authorship and its impact on Texas
and Texans. Original artwork,
including photo prints and
negatives that have significant
value as evidence of agency
programs as well as the potential
for re-use may be archival.
Documents that serve as final
publications must be maintained
for the retention period prescribed
for item number 1.3.001.
AV to be determined by the
Director of Communications
AV to be determined by the
Director of Communications

series_description:
Consist of records related to the review
process of production files routed for
comments, feedback, suggestions, and
approval.

internally by and externally for TCDRS.

series_description:
speeches, papers, presentations, or
reports delivered in conjunction with
TCDRS work not captured elsewhere.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
ARCHIVE NOTE: Only speeches,
papers, and presentations given by
or on behalf of executive staff,

series_description:
TCDRS documents authorizing final
disposition of records under a certified
records retention schedule. Includes
Certificate of Destruction (from third party
vendor) and Destruction Authorizations
(RMD 102) approved by Texas State
Library and Archives Commission.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 10 years
comments:
CAUTION: If destruction
authorizations are maintained as
part of 1.2.010 Records Disposition
Logs, then longer retention period
applies.
TCDRS FE + 10 yr retention period
exceeds TSL 3 for internal business
practices.
See 1.2.010, RIM1220.

series_description:
Logs or similar records listing records
disposed of by TCDRS, showing records
series title, dates of records, and date of
disposition.
retention_statement: 15 years
comments:
TCDRS 15 yr retention period
exceeds TSL 10 yr for internal
business practices.
Retention Note: Disposition can
mean destroyed or transferred.
See 1.2.001, RIM1200.

series_description:
TCDRS copy. A records retention schedule
identified the records that are created and
maintained by TCDRS, provides the
minimum timeframes the records must
be retained, and includes instruction for
their disposition. This series may include
working files and documentation of
certification and approval by the Texas
State Library and Archives Commission.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 5 years
comments:
Original is retained for 50 years by
the State and Local Records
Management Division, Texas State
Library and Archives Commission.
TCDRS US + 5 retention period
exceeds TSL US for internal
business practices.

series_description:
Records management plans and similar
records that establish the policies and
procedures under which records and
information are managed in TCDRS.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 5 years
comments:
TCDRS US + 5 yr retention period
exceeds TSL US + 1 yr for internal
business practices.

series_description:
Worksheets or working papers used to
capture records inventory information,
including location tracking and to
document existence and requirements of
a records series.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 5 years
comments:
TCDRS US + 5 retention period
exceeds TSL US for internal
business practices.

series_description:
Records related to the analysis and
summary of TCDRS insurance programs.
Includes insurance policies coverage
reports and insurance risk analysis.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
AV to be determined by Director of
Administrative Services

series_description:
Records related to legal proof of insurance
coverage. Includes certificates of
insurance provided to TCDRS by vendors,
tenants and TCDRS issued insurance
certificates.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 15 years

series_description:
Records related to claims filed against
TCDRS for a wide variety of liability
exposure, includes general claims and
claims specific to physical damage or loss
of property or the loss of the property's
income-producing abilities. Also includes
liability claim notifications and settlement
documents.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 15 years
comments:
See 5.4.001 for Insurance Claims -
Workers' Compensation Claims.

series_description:
Contracts executed, renewed, or amended
on or after September 1, 2015.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 15 years
comments:
TCDRS AC + 15 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 7 for internal
business practices.
Vital Record

series_description:
Contracts executed, renewed, or amended
on or before August 31, 2015.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years
comments: Vital Record

Plan Related

reporting for TCDRS annuitants and
member withdrawals.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years
comments:
TCDRS AC + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 4 for internal
business practices. Vital Record

series_title:
Federal Tax Records
Federal 1099
Miscellaneous Reporting
and Miscellaneous Tax
series_description:
Records supporting the taxes paid,
withheld, and reported for payments to
vendors or other miscellaneous 1099-Misc
reporting. Records related to
miscellaneous taxes and tax returns and
work papers not covered elsewhere.
Includes miscellaneous tax returns.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years
comments:
TCDRS AC + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 4 for internal
business practices. Vital Record

series_description:
Records that represent actual tax returns,
bills, work papers, audits and appeals for
property taxes. Includes property tax
returns, and appeals.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 6 years
comments:
TCDRS FE + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_title:
Federal Tax Records U.S.
Federal Tax Withholding
series_description:
Records supporting the taxes paid,
withheld, and reported for employees and
members. May also include rates of
taxation and quarterly reports to Texas
Workforce Commission.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years
comments:
TCDRS AC + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 4 for internal
business practices. Vital Record
